rationale: The citing note says it extends prior price-dispersion/ordered-search models with search-traffic prominence, and the cited paper is a closely matching theoretical source on ordered search, position prominence, shopper vs. nonshopper behavior, and mixed-strategy price competition. The shared mechanisms (prominence effects, asymmetric firms, nonmonotonic profit/price outcomes) make this plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism reference rather than an incidental mention, even though the raw evidence here is only a DOI match.
